Hey! You found the readme.


This portfolio was built with Astro, too many sleepless nights, and long conversations with Claude.


If you're reading this, you're the kind of person I want to work with!

project_01.exe — (RE)ROUTE

(RE)ROUTE

What if navigation optimised for how you feel, not just where you go? Reimagining walking as an experience with routing for safety, discovery, and human-ness.

119K street segments scored
372 hand-curated POIs
3 modes of navigation
Agentic WorkflowsUX ResearchProduct DesignData
Barcelona · Master's Thesis · Prototype · 2025
GO MODE

PROBLEM

Every navigation app solves the same problem: getting you there fast. But what about making the walk worth taking? (re)Route does more than just get you from A to B — it brings the city to you, with journeys that spark.

APPROACH

INTENT OVER INPUT

Users type feelings, not addresses. One AI call interprets mood as navigation intent.

DATA-INFORMED ROUTES

119K street segments scored for noise, safety, greenery. Routes built from real characteristics, not just distance.

SAFETY AS DEFAULT

After dark, every route auto-shifts to well-lit streets. Not a toggle — a baseline.

GO MODE
GO — destination routing
EXPLORE MODE
EXPLORE — vibe-based discovery
WANDER MODE
WANDER — compass + curated pins

DIFFERENTIATOR

119K street segments scored

Noise, greenery, cleanliness, cultural richness, safety — real data, not guesses.

AI-powered discovery

"Artsy date" → experimental galleries, design bookshops, natural wine bars. Verified against real place data.

Safety as baseline

After dark, every route shifts to well-lit, active streets. Not a mode — always on.

386 hand-curated POIs

Places that don't appear on commercial platforms. Themed walks, bloom calendars, hidden courtyards.

project_02.exe — SNAPP

SNAPP

What if we turned a map into a daily quest for beauty? A word a day. A shared visual diary for all.

X XXX
X XXX
X XXXX
Product DesignFull-StackUXGamification
Barcelona · In use · Feb 2026
DAILY PROMPT

PROBLEM

We walk past a thousand interesting things every day without noticing them. Snapp turns our everyday environment into a canvas for discovery, with a daily word prompt that gets everyone looking up and sharing what they find.

APPROACH

ONE CONSTRAINT

One word per day. The constraint IS the creativity. Limits create focus.

EPHEMERAL BY DESIGN

Map resets at midnight. No archive, no likes. The impermanence creates urgency without anxiety.

COLLECTIVE SEEING

Same prompt, different eyes. The city becomes a collaborative gallery through shared interpretation.

DAILY PROMPT
Daily word prompt
PHOTO CAPTURE
Camera + location tagging
SHARED MAP
City-wide shared gallery

DIFFERENTIATOR

Anti-social media

No algorithm, no followers, no likes. Using a phone to make you look up from it.

Ephemeral by design

The map resets at midnight. Today's gallery lives for exactly one day.

Deliberate constraints

One word + one day = focus. The shared map creates connection without competition.

City-wide collaboration

Barcelona becomes a collaborative, ever-changing gallery that lives for one day.

project_03.exe — PLANMYTRIP

PLANMYTRIP

A planning tool that thinks like an editor, not a spreadsheet. Live weather, image search, and inline editing — all in one flow.

XX XX
XXX XXX
XXX XXX
FrontendAPIsEditorial DesignInteractivity
Personal Project · In use · Mar 2025
planmytrip.app
ITINERARY VIEW

PROBLEM

"Trip planning tools are either ugly spreadsheets or rigid templates. I wanted something useful that also looks like something you'd want to look at."

APPROACH

EDITOR NOT SPREADSHEET

Planning should feel like designing a magazine, not filling cells. Editorial layout as interface.

LIVE DATA LAYER

Weather, images, and schedules update in real-time. A planning tool that knows what's happening.

AI-ASSISTED BUILD

Designed the spec, prompted the build. A proof that clear thinking produces working products.

planmytrip.app
ITINERARY VIEW
City intro + day overview
planmytrip.app
WEATHER & DETAILS
Weather widgets + timeline

DIFFERENTIATOR

Editorial design meets utility

City intro slides with split typography, day pages with photo galleries and timelines.

Live weather integration

Real-time weather data per destination via Open-Meteo API.

Built-in image search

Find and place photos without leaving the tool.

AI-assisted planning

Generate itinerary suggestions based on user preferences and real-time data with AI.

project_01.exe — (RE)ROUTE

(RE)ROUTE

What if navigation optimised for how you feel, not just where you go?

119K segments
386 POIs
89% vary routes
AIUX ResearchProduct DesignData
Barcelona · Master's Thesis · 2025
GO

PROBLEM

"Every navigation app gets you there fast. But what about making the walk worth taking?"

APPROACH

INTENT OVER INPUT

Mood as navigation intent.

DATA-INFORMED

Routes from real street data.

SAFETY DEFAULT

Well-lit streets after dark.

GO
GO mode
EXPLORE
EXPLORE mode
WANDER
WANDER mode

DIFFERENTIATOR

119K segments scored

Real data on noise, greenery, safety.

AI discovery

Verified place recommendations.

Safety baseline

Well-lit routes after dark.

project_02.exe — SNAPP

SNAPP

One word. One photo. One day.

1 word/day
1 photo
∞ perspectives
Product DesignFull-StackUX
Barcelona · In use · 2026
PROMPT

PROBLEM

"We walk past interesting things every day without seeing them."

APPROACH

ONE CONSTRAINT

Limits create focus.

EPHEMERAL

Resets at midnight.

COLLECTIVE

Shared interpretation.

PROMPT
Daily prompt
MAP
Shared map
CAPTURE
Photo capture

DIFFERENTIATOR

Anti-social media

No algorithm, no followers.

Ephemeral

Resets at midnight.

Constraints = focus

One word, one day.

project_03.exe — PLANMYTRIP

PLANMYTRIP

A planning tool that thinks like an editor, not a spreadsheet.

15 days
9 cities
LIVE weather
FrontendAPIsEditorial Design
Personal Project · In use · 2025
planmytrip.app
ITINERARY

PROBLEM

"Trip planning tools are ugly spreadsheets or rigid templates."

APPROACH

EDITOR NOT SPREADSHEET

Editorial layout as interface.

LIVE DATA LAYER

Real-time weather + images.

AI-ASSISTED BUILD

Clear spec, prompted build.

planmytrip.app
ITINERARY
Day overview
planmytrip.app
WEATHER
Weather widgets

DIFFERENTIATOR

Editorial design

City intros, photo galleries, timelines.

Live weather

Open-Meteo API per destination.

AI-assisted build

Designed system, Claude Code built it.
